parameters: "Aahh... close call...If someone had found me in there, I'd definitely have been
I'll have to take the stairs for the rest of the way..."
It's okay that I got off early, I still got a lot closer to my goal..."
This pathetic situation will be over soon enough!"

parameters.name: あーもうめちゃくちゃ！

parameters: \#Use the stairs to reach the 11th floor!
